texto: Automobiles have always been part of my life, and I'm sure they always will be. What is it about them that moves me? The sound of a great engine, the unity and uniqueness of an automobile's engineering and coachwork, the history of the company and the car, and, of course, the sheer beauty of the thing.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Edward Herrmann que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Automobiles have always been part of my life, and I'm sure they always will be. What is it about …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, beauty, car, com foco em trabalho e beauty.

texto: Flirting with the dark side has always had it's fascination. Because you learn, and there's wisdom there. Escpecially with the post-Freudian era with the young, the shadow is ninety percent gold. You hold treasures there that you need to learn about yourself to be a whole person.
